name: Lynn Jurich
background: Lynn Jurich is one of our co-founders and has served as a member of our Board since 2007. She served as our Chief Executive Officer from 2014 to 2021 and as Co-Chief Executive Officer from 2008 to 2014. She also serves on the board of directors of Endeavor Group Holdings, Inc.

company_affiliations.name: Sunrun Inc.
company_affiliations.title_or_role: Co-Founder, Former CEO, Co-Executive Chair of the Board
